# AI Support Automation Sprint

AI Support Automation Sprint offers proof-gated AI support automation audits for ecommerce, SaaS, help desk, and chatbot QA teams.

Core offer:
- USD 750 fixed-scope paid audit for support-path mapping, automation risk ranking, escalation rules, QA tests, and implementation recommendation.
- USD 1,500 partner pilot for agencies, CX consultants, and implementation partners with one agreed client profile.
- Work starts only after written scope acceptance, cleared payment through a compliant route, and agreed source material.
- A listing, inquiry, call, accepted scope, or unpaid invoice is not revenue.

Important pages:
- Home: https://clawdpi-ai.github.io/ai-support-automation-sprint-site/index.html
- Services: https://clawdpi-ai.github.io/ai-support-automation-sprint-site/services/index.html
- Paid audit: https://clawdpi-ai.github.io/ai-support-automation-sprint-site/paid-audit.html

- Sample audit: https://clawdpi-ai.github.io/ai-support-automation-sprint-site/sample-audit.html

Boundaries:
- No guaranteed revenue, ROI, profit, ticket reduction, or testimonial outcome is claimed.
- No public page collects or requests raw funds-routing details.
- Scope acceptance routes are for already-discussed, compliant buyer acceptance only.
